allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Content assets/language/en.json -Tail 3; Write-Output '---AR---'; Get-Content assets/language/ar.json -Tail 3; Write-Output '---BN---'; Get-Content assets/language/bn.json -Tail 3; Write-Output '---ES---'; Get-Content assets/language/es.json -Tail 3")
PowerShell($cmds = 'python','python3','py','node'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $r = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($r\){ "$c -> $\($r.Source\)" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } })

Bash(node -e "for\(const f of ['en','ar','bn','es']\){const j=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('assets/language/'+f+'.json','utf8'\)\);console.log\(f, '| you_saved:', JSON.stringify\(j.you_saved\), '| with_pro:', JSON.stringify\(j.with_pro\)\);}")
